name: Text Input
description: Provides text input to the workflow. Can be set manually or via workflow inputs.
doc:
Provide static or dynamic text to your workflow.

Usage:
• Enter text directly in the node
• Use as prompt input for AI nodes
• Pass configuration values between nodes

Label Property:
When running a workflow with inputs, the label identifies this input field. Use descriptive labels like 'Prompt' or 'Instructions'.

Tip: Resize the node for longer text content.

properties.name: Label
properties.description: Name for this input (used when running workflow with inputs)
